title.ko: 기계적 구성에만 특징이 있는 제어장치 제어계(보우덴(Bowden) 또는 유사한 기구; 이 목적에 특유하지 않는 전동장치 기구; 회전운동 전달용 변속 또는 역전 전동장치를 위한 것)
title.en: CONTROL DEVICES OR SYSTEMS INSOFAR AS CHARACTERISED BY MECHANICAL FEATURES ONLY ("Bowden" or like mechanisms F16C0001100000;gearings or mechanisms not peculiar to this purpose F16H;speed changing or reversing mechanisms for gearings conveying rotary motion F16H0059000000-F16H0063000000)

definition.ko: 수동제어기구, 1개이상의 피제어 부재를 조작하는 1개이상의 제어부재 G05G7/00, G05G9/00, G05G11/00, G05G13/00 자동운동개시장치; 트립(TRIP)기구 G05G15/00, G05G17/00 서보(SERVO)기구 G05G19/00 프로그램제어 장치 G05G21/00 쇄정(LOCKING) 수단, 제어수단; 위치를 정하는 수단 G05G5/00; 23/00 구성 부품 G05G1/00, G05G3/00, G05G25/00

title.ko: 제어부재, 예. 노브 또는 핸들; 그 조립체 또는 배열; 제어부재의 위치의 지시 (조이스틱 G05G9/04; 자동차용 스티어링 휠 B62D)
title.en: Controlling members, e.g. knobs or handles; Assemblies or arrangements thereof; Indicating position of controlling members (joysticks G05G0009040000;steering wheels for motor vehicles B62D)

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서는, 상반되는 지시가 없는 한, 최초개소 우선규칙이 적용되며, 즉. 각 계층적 레벨에서, 최초의 적절한 개소에 분류한다.

title.ko: 다수의 제어부재간의 배열 (양발에 의한 제어, 예. 차량 운전 교습을 위한 것은 G05G1/34; 둘 또는 그 이상의 페달로 조립된 탑재 수단 G05G1/36)
title.en: Arrangements of two or more controlling members with respect to one another (double foot control, e.g. for instruction vehicles G05G0001340000;mounting units comprising an assembly with two or more pedals G05G0001360000)

title.ko: 제어부재의 위치를 지시하기 위한 배열 (연속적으로 페달의 위치를 감지하는 수단은 G05G 1/38; 촉감으로 위치를 감지하는 수단은 G05G 5/03)
title.en: Arrangements for indicating the position of a controlling member (means for continuously detecting pedal position G05G0001380000;means for detecting position through tactile feedback G05G0005030000)
Controlling members for hand-actuation by linear movement, e.g. push buttons
Controlling members for hand-actuation by pivoting movement, e.g. levers
Details of their grip parts
Controlling members for hand-actuation by rotary movement, e.g. hand wheels
Details, e.g. of discs, knobs, wheels or handles
Means for securing the members on rotatable spindles or the like
Controlling members actuated by foot
with means to prevent injury
means disconnecting the connection between pedal and controlled member, e.g. by breaking or bending the connecting rod
means disconnecting the pedal from its hinge or support, e.g. by breaking or bending the support
Double foot controls, e.g. for instruction vehicles
Mounting units comprising an assembly of two or more pedals, e.g. for facilitating mounting
comprising means to continuously detect pedal position
adjustable
infinitely adjustable
non-pivoting, e.g. sliding
pivoting
about a central fulcrum
Means, e.g. links, for connecting the pedal to the controlled unit
Non-slip pedal treads; Pedal extensions or attachments characterised by mechanical features only
Non-slip treads
Pedal extensions
Manufacturing of pedals; Pedals characterised by the material used
Controlling members specially adapted for actuation by other parts of the human body than hand or foot

title.ko: 보조 작동부 또는 연장부로 구동할 수 있도록 특별하게 맞춰진 제어 부재; 그 제어 부재를 위한 동작 부재 또는 연장부 (페달연장부 G05G 1/487)
title.en: Controlling members specially adapted for actuation by auxiliary operating members or extensions; Operating members or extensions therefor (pedal extensions G05G0001487000)
Controlling members specially adapted for actuation by keys, screwdrivers or like tools
Rests or guides for relevant parts of the operator's body
Foot rests or foot guides
Arm rests

title.ko: 피제어부재(치차 시프터 요오크(Shifter-yoke) F16H 63/32); 그 조립체 또는 배열(피제어부재의 연동 G05G 5/08)
title.en: Controlled members (gear shifter yokes F16H0063320000); Assemblies or arrangements thereof (interlocking of controlled members G05G0005080000)

title.ko: 제어 메커니즘 부분의 움직임을 방지, 제한 또는 되돌리기 위한 수단, 예. 잠금 제어 멤버 (G05G17/00이 우선)
title.en: Means for preventing, limiting or returning the movements of parts of a control mechanism, e.g. locking controlling member (G05G0017000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 두 개 이상의 개별 단계 또는 방식으로 이동할 수 있는 제어 구성원의 원치 않는 움직임을 방지하는 수단, 예. 단계적 이동 또는 특정 이동 순서로 제한(G05G5/28이 우선)
title.en: Means preventing undesired movements of a controlling member which can be moved in two or more separate steps or ways, e.g. restricting to a stepwise movement or to a particular sequence of movements (G05G0005280000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 명령 지점 또는 기준점에서 제어부재의 도달에 대한 조작자의 감지를 향상시키기 위한 수단; 감각 부여, 예. 반발력을 일으키는 수단 (제어부재의 위치를 지시하는 조정은 G05G 1/015)
title.en: Means for enhancing the operator's awareness of the arrival of the controlling member at a command or datum position; Providing feel, e.g. means for creating a counterforce (arrangements for indicating the position of the controlling member G05G0001015000)

title.ko: 부재와 운동을 제한하는 정지장치, 예. 가조정 정지장치 (G05G 5/03, G05G 5/05, G05G 5/28이 우선)
title.en: Stops for limiting movement of members, e.g. adjustable stop (G05G0005030000, G05G0005050000, G05G0005280000 take precedence)

title.ko: 제어부재를 비조작 위치 또는 중위위치로 복귀시키 거나 또는 복귀되는 경향을 부여하는 수단, 예. 리턴스프링 또는 탄성 정지단을 가진 것(G05G 5/28이 우선)
title.en: Means for returning or tending to return controlling members to an inoperative or neutral position, e.g. by providing return springs or resilient end-stops (G05G0005280000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 하나 또는 유한수의 소정위치에만 부재를 잡아주기 위한 것 (G05G 5/03, G05G 5/05, G05G 5/28이 우선)
title.en: for holding members in one or a limited number of definite positions only (G05G0005030000, G05G0005050000, G05G0005280000 take precedence)
Interlocking of members, e.g. locking a member in a particular position before or during the movement of another member

title.ko: 불확정수의 위치에 부재를 잡아주기 위한 것, 예. 치가 있는 4분단에 의한 것(G05G 5/28이 우선)
title.en: for holding members in an indefinite number of positions, e.g. by a toothed quadrant (G05G0005280000 takes precedence)
by locking a member with respect to a fixed quadrant, rod, or the like
by friction
by positive interengagement, e.g. by a pawl
by locking a quadrant, rod, or the like carried by the member
by friction
by positive interengagement, e.g. by a pawl
by other means than a quadrant, rod, or the like
for preventing unauthorised access to the controlling member or its movement to a command position

title.ko: 하나의 피제어부재와 공동하는 하나의 제어부재를 구비한 수동제어기구; 그 세부 (제어부재 G05G1/00)
title.en: Manually-actuated control mechanisms provided with one single controlling member co-operating with one single controlled member; Details thereof (controlling members G05G0001000000)

title.ko: 전달동작이나 변환동작을 위한 또는 원격적으로 작용하기 위한 특수한 수단에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by special provisions for conveying or converting motion, or for acting at a distance
altering the ratio of motion or force between controlling member and controlled member as a function of the position of the controlling member

title.ko: 제어부재의 반복운동에 의하여 피제어부재의 운동을 증대시키는 것(G05G 7/08이 우선)
title.en: in which repeated movement of the controlling member produces increments of movement of the controlled member (G05G0007080000 takes precedence)
in which repeated movement of the controlling member moves the controlled member through a cycle of distinct positions

title.ko: 원격제어에 특히 적합되어진 것(G05G 7/04 - G05G 7/08까지 우선)
title.en: specially adapted for remote control (G05G0007040000-G05G0007080000 take precedence)
specially adapted for actuating a member on a system in motion with respect to the controlling member, e.g. on a rotating shaft

characterised by means for delaying initiation of, or making more gradual throughout, the movement of the controlled member in response to a given input from the controlling member, e.g. by providing lost motion in the command train
Special provisions for reducing the effect of slight relative movement between supports of the mechanism, e.g. resulting from resilient mounting of a controlled mechanism
Manually-actuated control mechanisms provided with one single controlling member co-operating with two or more controlled members, e.g. selectively, simultaneously
the controlling member being movable in different independent ways, movement in each individual way actuating one controlled member only
in which movement in two or more ways can occur simultaneously
the controlling member being movable by hand about orthogonal axes, e.g. joysticks
the controlling member comprising a ball
the controlled members being actuated successively by repeated movement of the controlling member
the controlled members being actuated successively by progressive movement of the controlling member
with preselection and subsequent movement of each controlled member by movement of the controlling member in two different ways, e.g. guided by a shift gate
Manually-actuated control mechanisms provided with two or more controlling members co-operating with one single controlled member

title.ko: 둘 이상의 피제어부재와 둘 이상의 피제어부재를 구비한 수동제어기구(연동 G05G 5/08)
title.en: Manually-actuated control mechanisms provided with two or more controlling members and also two or more controlled members (interlocking G05G0005080000)
with separate controlling members for preselection and shifting of controlled members

title.ko: 특정한 원인에 연유하여 자동적으로 시동시키기 위한 기계적 장치
title.en: Mechanical devices for initiating a movement automatically due to a specific cause
due to alteration of the sense of movement of a member
due to distance or angle travelled by a member

title.ko: 부재의 회전속도나 운동속도에 기인하는 것, 예. 상한 또는 하한의 통과(속도계 G01P)
title.en: due to the speed of rotation or of bodily movement of a member, e.g. passing an upper or lower limit thereof (speedometers G01P)
due to the load or torque on a member, e.g. if exceeding a predetermined value thereof
Mechanical devices for moving a member after being released; Trip or release mechanisms characterised thereby
Servo-mechanisms with follow-up action, e.g. occurring in steps

title.ko: 일련의 조작을 제어하는 기계적 장치, 즉. 프로그램 제어, 예. 캠 세트를 포함하는 것 (G05G5/02가 우선)
title.en: Mechanical apparatus for control of a series of operations, i.e. program control, e.g. involving a set of cams (G05G0005020000 takes precedence)
Means for ensuring the correct positioning of parts of control mechanisms, e.g. for taking-up play
self-adjusting
Other details, features or accessories of control mechanisms, e.g. supporting intermediate members elastically
Inhibiting the generation or transmission of noise
Sealing against entry of dust, weather or the like
